hero.title: High-Stakes Security. Zero Room for Failure.

cargo.title: Cargo Monitoring & Secure Logistics

consulting.title: Security Consulting & Risk Strategy

executive.title: Executive Protection

whyGsi.subtitle: We operate where precision matters, downtime is unacceptable, and security must never fail.

empresas.subtitle: 15+ specialized companies operating under one command structure.

companies.cometra: Founded in 1976, COMETRA is the cornerstone of the group. Cash-in-transit, cash processing and management, ATMs, and payroll services.
companies.sepsa: Founded in 1976 and part of GSI since 1988, SEPSA extends the group's reach in cash-in-transit, cash processing, and ATM services.
companies.seguritec: Founded in 1984, SEGURITEC operates across major cities with cash-in-transit, cash processing, and ATM services.
companies.gsi-seguridad: Launched in 2003 from Mexico City with 22 branches. Specialized security guards with nationwide reach.
companies.sepsa-custodias: Since 1999, operates armored units with national coverage for custody and transport of high-value goods.
companies.central-alarmas: Alarm systems, monitoring, and response solutions to protect assets and facilities nationwide.
companies.regio: Founded in 2001, provides cash-in-transit, cash processing, ATMs, payroll services, and electronic operations.
companies.cinco-elementos: Over 12 years of experience in uniform manufacturing for various sectors.
companies.ax-transporter: Specialized armored transport and high-security logistics services.
companies.gsi-fabril: Manufacturing of armoring, storage solutions, and merchandise and cash safekeeping with the highest quality standards.
companies.grumer: Security services powered by cutting-edge technology, continuous operational improvement, and market-leading innovation.
companies.impacto-total: ISO 9001:2015 certified with federal, state, and municipal operating permits. Members of AMESP, COPARMEX, and ESR.
companies.tameme: Specialized courier and valued document transport services with national coverage.
companies.tecnoval: Founded in 1996, dedicated to transporting large volumes of money and valued documents for banks and businesses.
companies.cogar-trade: Specialized trading of security products and solutions.

clients.subtitle: Leaders across finance, industry, retail, and government rely on GSI.
